overall.description: First-person exploration of the Slytherin common room and dormitories in Hogwarts Legacy. The player moves through gothic stone corridors, a grand common room with NPC students, and dormitories featuring green velvet four-poster beds, all rendered with high-quality game engine graphics featuring cool green tones and atmospheric lighting.

entered.detail: ornate golden frame with a portrait hanging above the desk

gothic stone fireplace with warm fire burning

segments.scene_description: The video begins in a narrow stone antechamber featuring a portrait and desk. The player opens an ornate wooden door and enters the Slytherin dormitory, revealing four-poster beds with green canopies and a lit fireplace in the gothic stone room.

segments.scene_description: The player explores the spacious dormitory with vaulted stone ceilings, walking past multiple four-poster beds draped in green velvet. The room features ornate rugs, a central birdcage structure, and warm firelight illuminating the gothic architecture.

ascending the curved stone staircase with ornate railings

agents.ego_description: opening the door and climbing the stone stairs toward the common room

decorative metal banister with intricate scrollwork
lit wall-mounted lamps providing warm light
tall stone archway leading to the main common room

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dormitory and ascends a grand stone staircase with ornate railings and wall sconces. The camera moves upward toward a large archway leading into the main common room area.

scene_state.functional_zone: Slytherin common room hall with columns and tapestries

segments.scene_description: The player enters the grand common room hall with massive stone columns and encounters NPC students in black robes conversing. The room features a grand piano, white sofas, and medieval suits of armor as the camera moves toward a corridor entrance.

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the long corridor beneath the arched stained glass ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow, atmospheric corridor with an arched ceiling featuring green stained glass windows that cast an ethereal glow. The walkway is lined with ornate metal railings and wall lanterns as the camera moves toward a distant wooden door.

segments.scene_description: The player enters a second dormitory room through a heavy wooden door, revealing another spacious chamber with four-poster beds, a central ornate structure, and stone archways. The room features similar green velvet canopies and gothic stone architecture.

events.description: exiting the dormitory back into the stained glass corridor
approaching and entering another wooden door at the corridor end

agents.ego_description: leaving the dormitory and walking back through the corridor to enter another room

curved corridor walls with gothic details

segments.scene_description: The player exits the second dormitory and returns to the atmospheric corridor with the stained glass ceiling. The camera proceeds down the walkway, passing wall lanterns and ornate railings, and approaches another wooden door at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the intimate confines of a private dormitory into the expansive grandeur of the Slytherin common room. It begins in a narrow stone antechamber before passing through an ornate wooden door to reveal a gothic dormitory filled with green velvet four-poster beds and the warm glow of a fireplace. As the camera explores the vaulted ceilings and ornate rugs of the sleeping quarters, the movement shifts toward an exit and ascends a grand stone staircase lined with wall sconces. The scene then opens through a large archway into a massive hall characterized by towering stone columns and the presence of students in black robes. Finally, the camera glides past a grand piano and medieval suits of armor, moving toward a corridor entrance within the opulent common area.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic corridor that briefly ventures into a lavish dormitory before returning to the atmospheric hallway. It begins by gliding through a narrow walkway under an arched ceiling, where green stained glass windows cast an ethereal glow over ornate metal railings and wall lanterns. As the camera reaches a heavy wooden door, the scene opens into a spacious chamber filled with green velvet four-poster beds and gothic stone archways. The perspective then shifts back through the doorway, returning to the corridor's cool lighting and rhythmic sequence of lanterns. Finally, the camera proceeds down the length of the walkway, moving past the stained glass toward another wooden door at the far end.
